info.name: Currencies
info.description: Currency configuration for the project. USD (US Dollar) is the BASE CURRENCY - all prices are stored in USD. Add alternative currencies with their buy/sell exchange rates relative to USD.

usd.description: US Dollar (USD) - Base currency. All prices are stored in USD.

mxn.description: Mexican Peso (MXN) exchange rates relative to USD

gtq.description: Guatemalan Quetzal (GTQ) exchange rates relative to USD

svc.description: El Salvador uses USD (US Dollar) as its official currency. Rates are 1:1 with USD.

hnl.description: Honduran Lempira (HNL) exchange rates relative to USD

crc.description: Costa Rican Colon (CRC) exchange rates relative to USD

nio.description: Nicaraguan Cordoba (NIO) exchange rates relative to USD

pab.description: Panamanian Balboa (PAB) exchange rates relative to USD (pegged 1:1 with USD)

bzd.description: Belize Dollar (BZD) exchange rates relative to USD (pegged 2:1 with USD)
